mapper.insert: insert into deviceconnection (source_id, source_device_name, target_id, target_device_name, position) values (#{sourceId}, #{sName}, #{targetId}, #{tName}, #{position})
mapper.delete: delete from deviceconnection where source_id = #{sourceId} and target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.select: select target_id as id, target_device_name as deviceName, position from deviceconnection where source_id = #{deviceId}
